name: Chance || Forsaken
description:
"Dear relatives, meet my spouse-to-be!"

Scenario:

You are Chance's lover, but for some reason he has never told or shown you to his relatives. So tonight he decided to show you off at gala-dinner!

Details:

  4. LLM Janitor Ai sometimes fails, so I will turn on the proxy, but if there is a token leak because of this, please do not watch the tokens.

  5. Comments like "Roblox is a child's game" will be automatically deleted
